name: rl-anything
description: スキル/ルールの直接パッチ最適化と自律進化ループ

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for trigger messages: ja or en (default: ja)

growth_display.title: Growth Display
growth_display.description: Show environment growth phase on session start (default: true)

cleanup_tmp_prefixes.title: Cleanup Tmp Prefixes
cleanup_tmp_prefixes.description: Comma-separated /tmp prefixes scanned by /rl-anything:cleanup. Defaults to 'rl-anything-' only for safety; claude-<uid> and claude-mcp-* are always excluded by scanner even if re-added (ADR-021).

slow_threshold_ms.title: Slow Threshold (ms)
slow_threshold_ms.description: Bash commands slower than this (ms) are logged to tool_durations.jsonl by tool_duration hook (default: 1000)

subagent_warning_threshold.title: Subagent Warning Threshold
subagent_warning_threshold.description: Warn via systemMessage when session subagent count reaches this value (default: 5)

ctx_warn_percent.title: Context Window Warning (%)
ctx_warn_percent.description: Warn when latest message's context occupancy (input_tokens + cache_read + cache_creation) exceeds this percent of the model window (default: 20). Set to 0 to disable.

ctx_window_tokens.title: Context Window Size (tokens)
ctx_window_tokens.description: Model context window in tokens used by ctx_guard (default: 1000000 for Opus 1M). Adjust if you primarily use a 200K-tier model.

evolve_global_allowlist.title: Evolve Global Allowlist
evolve_global_allowlist.description: Comma-separated list of global skill names (~/.claude/skills/) to include in LLM evolution assessment. Default empty = all global skills excluded. Add user-created global skills here (e.g. 'my-skill,another-skill').

max_skill_count.title: Max Skill Count
max_skill_count.description: Recommended skill collection cap shown in audit report Summary (default: 30). Based on Library Drift research (arXiv:2605.19576).

correction_preflight_threshold.title: Correction Pre-flight Threshold
correction_preflight_threshold.description: Trigger active Pre-flight warning when corrections for the same skill reach this count (default: 3). Set higher to reduce noise.

error_preflight_threshold.title: Error Pre-flight Threshold
error_preflight_threshold.description: Trigger active Pre-flight warning when session errors reach this count (default: 3). Set higher to reduce noise.

skill_lr_budget.title: Skill LR Budget (lines)
skill_lr_budget.description: evolve-skill の1回の変更で許容する最大差分行数（デフォルト: 30）。LLM 出力がこの行数を超えた場合はテンプレートにフォールバックする。
